task_completion.description: Verify the agent created a new Sequence with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an active 'Sequence' or 'Document Sequence' window in the iDempiere GUI with the 'Name' field set to 'Web_Sales_Seq_2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify the sequence numbering details are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Sequence window, look for 'Start No' set to 900000, 'Increment' set to 1, and 'Current Next' set to 900000.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created a new Document Type with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an active 'Document Type' window in the iDempiere GUI with the 'Name' field set to 'Web Standard Order'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Document Type categories and base types are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Document Type window, look for 'GL Category' set to 'Sales', 'Document Base Type' set to 'Sales Order' (or 'SOO'), and 'Sales Order Sub Type' set to 'Standard Order' (or 'SO').

task_completion.description: Verify the Document Type is assigned to the newly created sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Document Type window, look for the 'Document Sequence' field to be populated with 'Web_Sales_Seq_2025'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web application UI (menus, tabs, form fields) being interacted with, rather than a terminal, SQL client, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the created records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for visual indicators of a saved record in iDempiere, such as a 'Saved successfully' message, the save icon being greyed out/inactive after clicking, or the record appearing in a list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected values into a text editor or search bar.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values must be entered into the specific, correct form fields within the iDempiere application, not in a notepad, browser address bar, or generic text area.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Sequence Name must be exactly 'Web_Sales_Seq_2025'. Sequence Start and Current Next must be 900000. Document Type Name must be exactly 'Web Standard Order'. In iDempiere, the Document Base Type for 'Sales Order' corresponds to the code 'SOO', and the Sales Order Sub Type for 'Standard Order' corresponds to the code 'SO'.
